//: Self-contained tsconfig for the shared scoring contract. It exists so tooling that resolves the tsconfig for these files (the Cloudflare Worker's vite/vitest, which imports ../../utils/shared/*) stops here instead of walking up to the root tsconfig, whose `extends: ./.wxt/tsconfig.json` points at a WXT-generated file absent in the isolated worker CI job. The root `tsc --noEmit` uses the root config and ignores this nested one, so the extension build is unaffected. Deliberately no `extends`.
